hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.tf ]]; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE_PATH")" && tfsec . --soft-fail 2>&1; fi
FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.tf ]]; then terraform fmt "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1; fi
